subcodes.first_line: O distinguished son of the illustrious Zaynu'l-'Abidin! Though thy noble father hath winged his flight unto the Kingdom of lights, yet after his ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نجل مجید زین العابدین جلیل پدر بزرگوار بملکوت انوار پرواز نمود ولی بعد از اکمال
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the departed, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
